title: Wish & If Only
topics: wish + past · wish + would · wish + past perfect · if only · regret
description: Výrazy přání a lítosti — wish, if only, would rather, it's time.

vocabulary.cz: Wish for a different present/future situation

examples.en: I wish I had more time.
examples.cz: Přál/a bych si mít více času. (teď nemám)

examples.en: She wishes he would stop smoking.
I wish it would stop raining.
examples.cz: Přál/a bych si, aby přestalo pršet.

examples.en: I wish I had studied harder.
examples.cz: Přál/a bych si, že jsem více studoval/a.

examples.en: I wish I had taken that job.
examples.cz: Přál/a bych si, abych tu práci vzal/a.

quiz.sentence: I ate too much. I wish I ___ (not eat) so much.

tasks: 1. Write 5 wishes about your present life (wish + past simple)
2. Write 3 regrets about your past (wish/if only + past perfect)
3. Write 3 complaints about someone else's behaviour (wish + would)
